MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Raymond Yu is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Fred Townson is present.
Attorney Brian Scaccia representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAY-21-2012 is vacated.
